# float / storage

The **float** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `float` field token to a Postgres `double precision` column
via `build(name) => doublePrecision(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("float")`.

## Plugin reference

- Description: Float field type: DB storage capability — maps to a Postgres double precision column.
- Server:
  - Uses: `fields/server-capabilities.Fields`
  - DB schema: `plugins/fields/plugins/float/plugins/storage/server/internal/storage.test.ts`
- Cross-plugin:
